reviews.review_description: I really like the game,it’s not boring like other free games with all the crappy gtag movement.its just that the game is only playable on Saturdays,but overall the game is really good and so is the gameplay for a free game that is still in development.10/10
I haven’t played it yet but it looks fun and I want to get in on Saturdays I don’t really know what it’s about but it looks fun￼
A bit bugs with arms but this game is so fun tho

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed it, we are still in development so have a ton more content coming!

reviews.review_description: i'm sorry i just don't like it how it runs on saturdays

developer_response.body: The game is still being developed. It is only available on Saturday so we have all week to improve the game. At launch it will be fully available

reviews.review_description:
I have not played this game yet however i am hoping to get into the play test because it looks very fun and i hope it comes out for 
full release very soon
